meta.additional_notes: Supports small community initiatives led by residents. Funding amounts may vary depending on the project scope.

resource.title: CivicSpark Microgrant"
resource.description: The CivicSpark Microgrant program provides small grants to support resident-led community projects across Toronto. Funding is intended to help grassroots groups organize activities such as community events, neighborhood improvement projects, local food initiatives, and other community-building programs.

requirements.eligibility: Toronto residents and grassroots community groups leading local community-building projects.
requirements.documents_required: Applicants may need to provide a short project description, budget outline, and community impact plan.
